articles.title: From selfies to slogan: how Instagram is becoming India’s newest political battleground
articles.description: In the run-up to Assembly elections this month, social media is flooded with viral memes and AI-generated disinformation, and it is reshaping political speech, influence and visibility online

articles.title: BJP plotted Malda unrest, PM should stop peddling falsehood: TMC
articles.description: Senior TMC leader and State Education Minister Bratya Basu accused the PM of spreading hatred towards the Bengali language

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: FCRA amendment is an attack on minorities, says Kharge
articles.description: He says the proposed amendment is not merely a legal change but a targeted strike against the Christian community; the AICC president claims a mutual understanding between LDF and BJP in State ahead of polls

articles.title: Quote of the Day: Narayana Murthy's words of wisdom on embracing change — ‘Growth is painful. Change is painful. But….’
articles.description: N R Narayana Murthy, co-founder of Infosys, emphasized that growth involves discomfort and change, urging individuals to embrace transformation rather than remain stagnant in limiting situations.

topStories.title: End To Iran War In Sight? 45-Day Ceasefire Being Discussed, Says Report
topStories.description: The hopes of a partial deal in the next 48 hours, a timeline within which Trump's threat to hit Iran's infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened, are slim.

topStories.title: 'Tuesday, 8:00 P.M. ET': Trump Extends Deadline After 'Open The Hormuz Strait' Warning
topStories.description: US President Trump appears to extend the deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, emphasising a Tuesday evening timeline amid escalating tensions.

topStories.title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief
topStories.description: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

topStories.title: Iran to respond 'in kind' as Trump issues expletive-laden Hormuz threat — ‘whole region is going to burn’
topStories.description: Since the start of the war on 28 February, Trump has repeatedly threatened to attack Iran's critical civilian and energy infrastructure, but has thus far refrained from doing so, citing ongoing negotiations. The deadline issued on Sunday, however, appeared to be a final extension.

topStories.title: US-Iran war looking at 45-day ceasefire? Report says efforts underway as clock ticks down to Trump's Hormuz deadline
topStories.description: Last-ditch efforts are underway to seal a truce in the next 48 hours, prior to the expiry of US President Donald Trump's deadline to Tehran to accept a deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: ‘War has been a failure’: US politicians call trump ‘unhinged madman’ after expletive-laden threat to Iran
topStories.description: Chris Murphy urged constitutional lawyers to consider the 25th Amendment due to Trump's erratic behavior. Iranian officials deemed his threats as delusional.

topStories.title: Supreme Court’s Sabarimala review bench reflects diversity across faith, region and gender
topStories.description: SC's decision to constitute a nine-judge bench for the Sabarimala review is not merely a procedural step to revive a long-pending constitutional reference.

topStories.title: Davanagere South bypoll: Cong faces rebel threat, disquiet among Muslims
topStories.description: The Congress faces internal strife in the Davanagere South by-election due to discontent over candidate choice, risking voter support from the Muslim community.

topStories.title: US-Iran war LIVE: Trump issues expletive-laden Hormuz deadline to Tehran; Netanyahu celebrates rescue of American pilot
topStories.description: US-Iran war LIVE: President Trump on Sunday issued an expletive-laden threat to Iran, announcing what appeared to be a new and final deadline for Tehran to reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz, whose closure has upended global energy markets. Follow this space for latest news from the Middle East.

topStories.title: War jitters? Trump says US feared Iran ‘trap’ during F-15 crew rescue mission
topStories.description: Trump says the US feared an Iranian trap during a high-risk F-15 rescue mission, as a stranded crew member survived over 24 hours before special forces extraction.

topStories.title: Trump declares victory after rescue but threats to US operation in Iran still loom
topStories.description: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.

topStories.title: Iran war live: Tehran rejects Trump’s Tuesday deadline on Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Iranian officials dismiss Trump's ultimatum, condemn latest threats as 'incitement to war crimes'.

dailyNews.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.title: UK police arrest seven protesters near RAF base used by US
dailyNews.description: The activists were protesting the alleged use of the RAF base as a departure point for US aircraft.

dailyNews.title: US pizza chain Gina Maria’s closes all US outlets after 50 years, files for bankruptcy
dailyNews.description: Gina Maria's Pizza, a 50-year-old Minnesota chain, has filed for Chapter 7 bankruptcy with $2.9 million in debt. All four Twin Cities locations shut without warning in October 2025, marking the end of a regional institution.

dailyNews.title: Driver faces impaired driving charges after Lao New Year incident
dailyNews.description: A driver in Louisiana US, was charged with impaired driving after plowing into a crowd, injuring at least 15.

dailyNews.title: Dhanushkodi Athithan, a Congress veteran, calls for making the party a people’s movement
dailyNews.description: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

dailyNews.title: New Hampshire suspect who shot officer and triggered massive manhunt killed in police gunfight
dailyNews.description: Suspect who allegedly shot a New Hampshire police officer is killed in a gunfight after a massive manhunt that included a shelter-in-place order.

dailyNews.title: Baby among 3 dead in holiday horror as Easter egg hunt turns deadly
dailyNews.description: Three people were killed after high winds knocked down a tree onto a group of people in Germany during an Easter egg hunt on Sunday morning, police said.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II astronaut marvels at 'beauty of creation' in Easter message from deep space
dailyNews.description: Victor Glover delivers a powerful Easter message from the Artemis II Orion capsule, calling Earth a beautiful oasis in the emptiness of the cosmos.

dailyNews.title: Warnock likens pro-Trump Christian leaders to those who used Scripture to defend slavery
dailyNews.description: Sen. Warnock compares Christian leaders backing Trump to those who justified slavery, saying their faith-based support for the president is misguided.

dailyNews.title: Dawn Staley gives classy answer after Geno Auriemma question following national title loss: 'It's UCLA's day'
dailyNews.description: Dawn Staley praised UCLA after the Gamecocks' championship loss, refusing to discuss her viral exchange with UConn's Geno Auriemma post-Final Four.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie's Easter message reveals anguish as mom missing 63 days
dailyNews.description: Savannah Guthrie delivers an emotional Easter message about faith and doubt as her mother Nancy Guthrie remains missing after 63 days in Arizona.

dailyNews.title: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
dailyNews.description: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

dailyNews.title: This Is Not China’s War, but Beijing Started Preparing for It Years Ago
dailyNews.description: Long concerned about geopolitical crises, China redoubled efforts to secure energy security when President Trump started raising the stakes in his first term.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
dailyNews.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war passes the five-week mark, President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing for days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't let the Strait of Hormuz open.

dailyNews.title: 4/5: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Latest details on daring mission to rescue U.S. airman from Iran after fighter jet shot down; Trump sends profanity-laden threat to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran: U.S. airman rescued, Trump makes profanity-laced ultimatum
dailyNews.description: Charlie D'Agata and Taurean Small have the latest news on the Iran war, including details on the rescue of a U.S. airman whose fighter jet was shot down and President Trump's new demand for the Iranians to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Tuesday strikes on Iran's power plants and bridges in profanity-laden post
dailyNews.description: President Trump threatened to hit Iranian power plants and bridges on Tuesday as he posted another ultimatum on social media Sunday morning. "Open the F*****' Strait, you crazy bastards, or you'll be living in Hell," the president wrote. Taurean Small reports

dailyNews.title: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
dailyNews.description: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Japan, South Korea stocks open higher as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
dailyNews.description: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces had rescued an American airman shot down in Iran last week.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump again threatens Iran's infrastructure ahead of his latest Strait of Hormuz deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has threatened major strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure and bridges ahead of his latest deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz
